name: Mount Agung
eruptionHistory: The 1963 eruption was one of the most devastating of the 20th century, killing over 1,100 people and lowering global temperatures. Renewed activity began in 2017.
description: Mount Agung is the highest point in Bali and a sacred volcano in Balinese Hinduism. The Besakih Temple, Bali's most important Hindu temple, sits on its slopes.
